idea-plugin.name: One Dark Theme
idea-plugin.description:
A polished One Dark theme for JetBrains IDEs, maintained as a modern fork of the original project.

The theme preserves the familiar One Dark feel, but uses a slightly darker, cooler palette with fewer yellow tones. It was designed for calm work during long coding sessions and to look especially good on OLED and QD-OLED displays.

Available themes:

  • One Dark
  • One Dark Vivid
  • One Dark Islands
  • One Dark Islands Vivid

After installation, select the theme in Settings | Appearance & Behavior | Appearance. For Islands variants, enable Settings | Advanced Settings | Enable Islands UI for custom themes.
